- 让云端视频在列表和网格里显示缩略图，浏览远程目录时更容易分辨内容
- 对齐云端列表和网格的本地浏览样式，包括圆角、间距和选中反馈
- 移除云端页面里容易误解的收藏按钮，让服务器和文件操作更清晰

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Show thumbnails for cloud videos in list and grid layouts, making remote folders easier to browse
- Match cloud list and grid styling with local browsing, including rounded corners, spacing, and selection feedback
- Remove confusing favorite buttons from cloud pages so server and file actions are clearer

</details>
